subject.description: A stylish, confident female professional wearing a high-end beige cashmere sweater and subtle gold aesthetic jewelry.
subject.action: Sitting at a beautiful marble table, looking off-camera in a candid, documentary style. Her hands rest gracefully next to a beautifully styled, minimalist notepad with 'Set & Regret' handwritten on it.

setting.location: A sophisticated modern office with a marble or rich wood table. A half-empty artisan coffee cup and a closed silver laptop sit in the beautifully blurred foreground.

composition.framing: Rule of thirds, centered. MUST follow cropping rules: never cut in flesh, leave perfect headspace above her hair, and give her chin ample breathing room.

camera_settings.depth_of_field: Low depth of field, foreground objects and background are blurred.

lighting.type: Natural light from a modern office window.
lighting.color_grading: Warm tones, aesthetic, muted colors, 'quiet confidence' vibe.

negative_prompt: Things that MUST NOT appear in the image: watermarks, deformities, bad anatomy, messy desk, ugly fonts, cartoon, illustration, cut off head, cut flesh, strange framing.
